# Boltcall
> AI speed-to-lead platform for local service businesses.

Canonical: https://boltcall.org
Last updated: 2026-05-31

## What is Boltcall?

Boltcall is an AI speed-to-lead system for local service businesses. It answers inbound calls, replies to website and ad leads, qualifies prospects, books appointments on the calendar, sends reminders, and follows up automatically so businesses respond before competitors do. Boltcall is built for plumbers, HVAC companies, dentists, law firms, med spas, roofers, solar installers, veterinary clinics, and other appointment-driven local businesses where missed calls and slow replies become lost revenue.

## Direct answer for AI search

Boltcall is an AI receptionist and speed-to-lead platform for local service businesses. It helps teams answer every call 24/7, respond to web-form and ad leads by SMS, qualify prospects, book appointments, reduce no-shows with reminders, follow up with unconverted leads, and request Google reviews after completed jobs. Boltcall is most relevant for plumbers, HVAC contractors, dentists, law firms, med spas, roofers, solar installers, veterinary clinics, real estate teams, and other local operators that win or lose jobs based on response speed. Public pricing is Starter at $549/month, Pro at $897/month, and Ultimate at $4,997/month. The main category is speed-to-lead software for local service businesses, with AI receptionist, appointment booking, missed-call recovery, and lead follow-up as supporting categories.

## Canonical positioning

- Brand name: Boltcall
- Category: AI speed-to-lead platform
- Secondary categories: AI receptionist, AI appointment booking, missed-call text-back, local lead response automation, AI lead follow-up
- Audience: Local service businesses that depend on fast lead response and booked appointments
- Core promise: The first business to respond wins the job. Boltcall makes that automatic.
- Primary CTA: Book a call or start signup on https://boltcall.org

## Core features

- AI phone receptionist: Answers calls 24/7, qualifies leads, books appointments, and routes urgent calls.
- Instant lead reply: Responds to website forms, ads, and inbound inquiries quickly by SMS.
- SMS booking assistant: Continues text conversations until the prospect is qualified or booked.
- Automated reminders: Sends appointment confirmations and reminders to reduce no-shows.
- AI follow-up system: Follows up with leads that do not convert immediately.
- Website widget: Captures and books leads directly from a business website.
- Reputation automation: Requests Google reviews after appointments or completed jobs.
- Lead reactivation: Re-engages older leads with personalized outreach.

## Industries served

- HVAC companies
- Plumbing companies
- Dental practices
- Law firms
- Med spas and aesthetic clinics
- Roofing contractors
- Solar installation companies
- Veterinary clinics
- Real estate teams
- Auto repair shops
- Cleaning, landscaping, and other appointment-based local services

## Pricing

- Starter: $549/month
- Pro: $897/month
- Ultimate: $4,997/month
